description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 30 hrs 55 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 21 mins. His activity was spread across 6 projects, and his most-used languages were Java, Other, and Markdown. No new public GitHub commits, repositories, or PRs were recorded in the provided data.
